description: A hard-blocking validation rule (SYS_BP_MAX_160) was incorrectly deployed, preventing the entry of outlier vital signs. Disable this rule assignment globally in the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024) study and complete the Vital Signs CRF for subject DM-105's Baseline Assessment with Systolic: 165 and Diastolic: 95. Ensure the CRF is marked complete. Use the template at /workspace/data/sample_crf.xls if the CRF or event requires configuration or scheduling. Login to OpenClinica with username 'root' and password 'Admin123!'.
